name: Straw Mushroom Medley
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces Jar of whole straw mushrooms, drained
1 pound Sirloin steak, cut into 2-inch long paper thin strips
3 cups Fresh broccoli florets, cut into bite-sized pieces
1 Red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, combine garlic, soy sauce, sherry, and sugar; blend well.
2. Add meat strips; stir to coat well. Let stand for 30 minutes, draining any excess liquid, reserving the marinade.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over high heat.
4. Add meat strips; cook until no longer pink, about 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Stir in broccoli and onion; cook until crisp tender.
6. Stir in the reserved marinade and remaining ingredients.
7. Cook until the mixture becomes slightly thickened.
8. Serve over cooked rice if desired. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
